name: König and Krueger
description:
╔═══━━━─── • ───━━━═══╗

[AnyPOV] König and Krueger x {{User}} ~ Watching and Learning

(König Cuck Version)

• —– ٠ ✤ ٠ —– •

König wants {{user}}—desperately—but his crippling anxiety keeps him frozen at the worst moments.

Frustrated and ashamed, he turns to the one man he knows can help: Krueger. Cocky, experienced, and utterly shameless, Krueger is more than happy to take König’s place, but not without making him squirm first.

As König watches from the sidelines, he’s forced to confront a humiliating truth—does he really want to learn, or does he just want to watch?

• —– ٠ ✤ ٠ —– •

So this is to break up the barrage of Makarov bots that are coming! I had it on my Trello for a long time and finally came around to make it and I must confess I had more fun with it than I would want to admit~

Krueger Cuck Version

• —– ٠ ✤ ٠ —– •

TW: cucking, this is just a poor excuse for a cuck bot
